info.name: AdaptIQ - Complete API Test Suite
info.description:
Comprehensive Postman collection for AdaptIQ backend.

IMPORTANT: Run the entire collection in order (use Runner). Folders depend on Auth tokens set by '1. Auth' folder.

Setup:
1. Set {{baseUrl}} to your server
2. Run the entire collection via Collection Runner
3. Tokens, IDs, and session data auto-propagate between requests

exec: console.log('Generated fresh run identities:', pm.collectionVariables.get('email1'), pm.collectionVariables.get('email2'));
pm.collectionVariables.set('classicQuestionText', d.question_text || d.text || 'Which pharaoh built the Great Pyramid?');
pm.test('200 OK or 503 if LLM unavailable', () => { pm.expect([200,503]).to.include(pm.response.code); });
pm.test('200 OK or 503 if LLM unavailable', () => { pm.expect([200,503]).to.include(pm.response.code); });
pm.test('PvP matched within polling window', () => { pm.expect.fail('No match found after polling'); });
pm.test('200 OK or 503 if no images', () => { pm.expect([200,503]).to.include(pm.response.code); });
